hero.description: I design secure, modern and high-performance digital solutions. Passionate about innovation in the service of system reliability.

about.title: About
about.p1: A third-year (L3) student at ENI, I am a Full Stack developer passionate about building high-performance and secure web solutions. My technical expertise combines robust backend architecture design — such as Node.js with Prisma ORM — with modern, reactive interfaces built with React.js and Tailwind CSS.
about.p2: Beyond development, I bring skills in cybersecurity, DevOps automation, and UX/UI principles to ensure reliable and intuitive products. Rigorous in requirements analysis, I am committed to crafting unique digital tools that precisely meet the functional and technical expectations of each project.
